name: moai-pi-overlay
description: Project-local pi overlay for running the Claude-oriented MoAI harness with semantic parity.

scripts.check: for f in extensions/moai-claude-compat/index.ts extensions/moai-claude-compat/src/*.ts; do node --experimental-strip-types --check "$f" || exit 1; done; node --experimental-strip-types extensions/moai-claude-compat/statusline-footer.test.mjs
